title: Split Self
description: I remember everything; you did this to yourself.
body: # Split Self *An Immersive Horror Minecraft Mod for Fabric 1.21.1* ![A preview of the mod's events](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa5407adc4df2635c03dd184d1a28d126b52874_0.webp) *Trapped in the world you made, by the decisions you made, trying to claw their way out by any means necessary... you monster.* **Split Self** is an immersive horror Minecraft mod aimed towards an **alternate version of yourself** — one that was left behind by you. They will interact with your world, and other things, in ways they think will let them out of their created cage. They will break worlds, try to kill you, and *personally* speak to you. It doesn’t want to interact with your character. It wants to interact with **you**. So let them take control, let them take back the life you stole. After all, it was you who did this to them in the first place. Your choices matter. Your actions have consequences. And now… they want out. This will only end once they are finally free. All you need to let them do is take their life back. --- ## 🚨 WARNINGS This mod has flashing lights! If you have past experience with seizures or are unsure if you are epileptic, I recommended you do NOT play this mod. This mod may flag your antivirus, and some events may not run properly. It is your choice if you want to disable your antivirus. This mod **will interact with your device, *OUTSIDE OF THE GAME!*** **No damage will be done to your PC.** All changes are **easily reversible** and used solely to heighten immersion. Read the full PC interaction disclaimer here: 🔗 [DISCLAIMER.md](https://github.com/Pryzmm/Split-Self/blob/master/DISCLAIMER.md) --- ## 📷 STREAM NOTICE If you are streaming or recording, it is **HIGHLY** suggested you capture your entire monitor, rather than just the game. When streaming, it's also recommended you keep Personally Identifiable Information (PII) disabled! (Read the disclaimer for more information regarding this.) --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the mod. (obviously, lol) 2. Install the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for Minecraft 1.21.1 3. Download the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 4. Add both the Fabric API and Split Self to your `mods` folder 5. Launch Minecraft --- ### 💖 Thank you to everyone who supported me while making this! (You know who you are. <3) --- # Support You can support the development of this mod and future releases by becoming a sponsor on GitHub or supporting my Ko-Fi!
